title: eora cheesemanii
intro: Eora cheesemanii, commonly known as the Cheeseman's peppercorn tree or Cheeseman's pepper tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It is native to New Zealand and has been traditionally used in Maori medicine for its numerous health benefits. The Cheeseman's peppercorn tree is rich in bioactive constituents, including flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its therapeutic actions of reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Regular consumption of the Cheeseman's peppercorn tree is believed to provide benefits such as lowering blood pressure, improving digestive health, and enhancing cognitive function due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids.
